text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh? There's something fluttering around over
there...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Could it be a fairy? Or a Japanese yokai?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can't believe I finally get to meet one.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh... It was just a plastic bag...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Environmental issues ought to be a higher
priority agenda item in this area.
